testsuite.name: com.tests.PlaceOrderTest

testcase.name: verifyCardDisplayed
testcase.system-out: PASS: Card number label/details are displayed.

testcase.name: verifyClickingPlaceOrderOpensTheOrderModal
testcase.system-out: PASS: Place Order modal opened successfully.

testcase.name: verifyPurchaseSucceedsWhenAllValidDetailsAreEntered
testcase.system-out: PASS: Purchase succeeds with valid details.

testcase.name: verifyCloseAndPurchaseButtonsAreVisible

failure.message: Close and Purchase buttons should be visible. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Close and Purchase buttons should be visible. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.tests.PlaceOrderTest.verifyCloseAndPurchaseButtonsAreVisible(PlaceOrderTest.java:113) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)
testcase.system-out: DEFECT: Close or Purchase button is not visible.

testcase.name: verifyPopupContainsId
testcase.system-out: PASS: Popup contains Id.

testcase.name: verifyModalClosesUsingXIcon

failure.message: Place Order modal should close using X icon. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Place Order modal should close using X icon. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.tests.PlaceOrderTest.verifyModalClosesUsingXIcon(PlaceOrderTest.java:161) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)

testcase.name: verifyUserCanTypeIntoAllPlaceOrderFields
testcase.system-out: PASS: User can type into all Place Order fields.

testcase.name: verifyConfirmationPopupContainsPurchaseDetails
testcase.system-out: PASS: Confirmation popup contains purchase details.

testcase.name: verifyPopupContainsDate
testcase.system-out: PASS: Popup contains Date.

testcase.name: verifyAllInputFieldsAreDisplayedInPlaceOrderModal
testcase.system-out: PASS: All Place Order input fields are displayed.

testcase.name: verifyPurchaseWithLongInputValuesInAllFields

failure.message: Purchase should not be allowed with overly long input values. expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Purchase should not be allowed with overly long input values. expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:79) at com.tests.PlaceOrderTest.verifyPurchaseWithLongInputValuesInAllFields(PlaceOrderTest.java:357) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)
testcase.system-out: DEFECT: Purchase is allowed with very long input values.

testcase.name: verifyDetailsNotEmpty
testcase.system-out: PASS: Purchase details are not empty.

testcase.name: verifyPurchaseWithAlphabeticCreditCardValue

failure.message: Purchase should not be allowed with alphabetic credit card value. expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Purchase should not be allowed with alphabetic credit card value. expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:79) at com.tests.PlaceOrderTest.verifyPurchaseWithAlphabeticCreditCardValue(PlaceOrderTest.java:327) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)

testcase.name: verifyPurchaseWithOnlyNameFilled
testcase.system-out: PASS: Purchase is blocked with only Name filled.

testcase.name: verifyPurchaseConfirmationPopupDisplayed
testcase.system-out: PASS: Purchase confirmation popup is displayed.

testcase.name: verifyPopupOnlyAfterSuccess
testcase.system-out: PASS: Popup appears after successful purchase.

testcase.name: verifyPurchaseWithInvalidCreditCardFormat

failure.message: Purchase should not be allowed with invalid credit card format. expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Purchase should not be allowed with invalid credit card format. expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:79) at com.tests.PlaceOrderTest.verifyPurchaseWithInvalidCreditCardFormat(PlaceOrderTest.java:313) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)

testcase.system-out: PASS: Date is displayed in confirmation popup.

testcase.system-out: PASS: Place Order modal title is correct.

testcase.system-out: PASS: Month field accepts numeric input.

testcase.system-out: PASS: OK button is visible.

testcase.system-out: PASS: Unique order ID/content generated for separate purchases.

testcase.name: verifyPurchaseAmountCorrect
testcase.system-out: PASS: Purchase amount matches cart total.

testcase.system-out: PASS: Year field accepts numeric input.

testcase.name: verifyPlaceOrderButtonIsVisibleOnCartPage
testcase.system-out: PASS: Place Order button is visible on Cart page.

testcase.name: verifyOkButtonInConfirmationPopupClosesThePopup
testcase.system-out: PASS: OK button is visible in confirmation popup. PASS: OK button closes confirmation popup.

testcase.name: verifyConfirmationPopupShowsSuccessMessageAfterValidPurchase
testcase.system-out: PASS: Confirmation popup shows success details.

testcase.name: verifyNameDisplayed
testcase.system-out: PASS: User name is displayed correctly.

testcase.name: verifyPurchaseWithAllFieldsBlank
testcase.system-out: PASS: Purchase is blocked with all fields blank.

testcase.name: verifyPurchaseWithSpecialCharactersInNameField

failure.message: Purchase should not be allowed with special characters in Name field. expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Purchase should not be allowed with special characters in Name field. expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:79) at com.tests.PlaceOrderTest.verifyPurchaseWithSpecialCharactersInNameField(PlaceOrderTest.java:341) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:739) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:614) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner$SuiteWorker.run(SuiteRunner.java:463) at org.testng.internal.thread.ThreadUtil.lambda$execute$0(ThreadUtil.java:64) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)
testcase.system-out: DEFECT: Purchase is allowed with special characters in Name field.

testcase.name: verifyCartIsClearedAfterSuccessfulPurchase
testcase.system-out: PASS: Cart is cleared after successful purchase.

testcase.name: verifyTotalLabelIsDisplayedInPlaceOrderModal
testcase.system-out: PASS: Total label/value is displayed in Place Order modal. Total: 360

testsuite.system-out: PASS: Alert message text is displayed correctly: Please fill out Username and Password. PASS: Clicking the Login link opens the Login modal. PASS: Correct validation alert displayed when Username is blank: Please fill out Username and Password. PASS: Close button is visible in signup modal. PASS: Close icon is visible in signup modal. DEFECT: Weak credentials were accepted or not properly rejected. Username: test, Password: 123, Alert: This user already exist. PASS: About modal opens successfully. PASS: Carousel Next button changes the active slide. PASS: Carousel Previous button changes the active slide back. PASS: Homepage carousel is visible on page load. PASS: Clicking Cart navigates user to the cart page. PASS: Clicking Home keeps user on home page and products are displayed. PASS: Contact modal opens successfully. PASS: Each category filter returns at least one product. PASS: Laptops category displays products. Product count: 6 PASS: Logout link is not visible before login. PASS: All main navigation bar links are visible on page load. PASS: Monitors category displays products. Product count: 2 PASS: Page title contains STORE. Actual title: STORE PASS: Phones category displays products. Product count: 9 PASS: Product cards are loaded and visible on the home page initially. PASS: Phones, Laptops and Monitors category links are visible. PASS: Clicking Next changes the product list. PASS: Each category returns at least one product. PASS: Laptops category displays products. Count: 6 PASS: Laptops category shows relevant laptop products. PASS: Monitors category displays products. Count: 2 PASS: Monitors category shows relevant monitor products. PASS: Next pagination button is visible. PASS: Phones category displays products. PASS: Product category section is visible. PASS: Switching between categories updates the product list. PASS: Add to cart button is displayed on product details page. PASS: Monitors category product details page opened successfully. PASS: Phones category product details page opened successfully. PASS: Product description is displayed on product details page. PASS: Product price is displayed on product details page.
